title: Refinished Oak Side Table
description: Solid oak side table refinished in Fusion Mineral Paint "Homestead Blue" with a matte topcoat. Gentle distressing on the edges. 22" × 18" × 24".

title: Victorian Horse Brass — Sun Face
description: Authentic Victorian-era horse brass with embossed sun face design. Excellent patina, approximately 3.5" diameter.

title: Mid-Century Dining Chair (Set of 2)
description: Pair of mid-century dining chairs with newly upholstered seats in neutral linen. Frames refinished in Fusion "Ash" with clear wax finish.

title: Horse Brass — Crown & Scroll
description: Classic crown and scroll horse brass, circa early 1900s. 3" diameter with original hanging loop intact.

title: Fusion Paint — Homestead Blue (500ml)
description: Fusion Mineral Paint in Homestead Blue, 500ml. Built-in top coat — no sealing required. Available for pickup at the booth.

title: Fusion Paint — Casement (500ml)
description: Fusion Mineral Paint in Casement, 500ml. A warm off-white — one of the most popular neutrals for furniture and cabinetry.

title: Refinished Farmhouse Bench
description: Long farmhouse bench in solid pine, sanded and painted in Fusion "Casement" with light distressing. 48" long. Perfect for an entry or foot of the bed.
